stemHtml:
Given the following information, what is the additional fuel required? The Pre-determined Point PDP procedure has to be applied to a Commercial Air Transport flight under IFR for an aeroplane with turbine engines, from the departure aerodrome A to the destination aerodrome B, with one alternate aerodrome C.

Distance from A to B: 1600 NM
Distance from A to C: 1350 NM
TAS: 410 kt
Fuel flow: 2750 kg/h
Headwind Component: 15 kt
